warnings: GRID-RELEVANT (reporting only, master file not edited): bottom dimension chain reads (right to left, grid3 to grid1) '0.80 | 0.50 | 3.00 | 3.50 | 1.10 | 0.20' with secondary grouping '1.30 | 6.50 | 1.30' — matches the master grid's x_lines and dummy grids 1'/3' exactly (mirrored order vs. elevation 1).
This elevation corresponds to compass-slot '3' on the floor plan's 4-way elevation callout bubble (referencing sheet A-09).
This is the only elevation among the 4 showing a ground-level entrance door — consistent with this being the building's front/entry facade.
Individual door/window opening-number-to-D/W-schedule cross-match not confidently resolvable at this resolution — see _หน้า16_door_window_schedule.json for the schedule itself.
